name: Justice Has Many Faces
overview: Gaber Ma'moun Nassar, a famous businessman with a good reputation among people, lives a quiet life with his wife and daughter. Throughout his whole life, he has tried to hide the fact that he is an illegitimate child. When a murder occurs and he gets investigated, it reveals his hidden secrets.

trailers.title: للعدالة وجوه كثيرة: تتر البداية .. ياسر عبد الرحمن
